name: 折叠刀（★） | 伽玛多普勒
nameZh: 折叠刀（★） | 伽玛多普勒
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated.
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 这件武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料，仿大理石纹调和，并对其危险性进行了伪装。
